hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(f)process.stdout.write(f)}catch(e){}})" | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; then npx eslint --fix "$f"; npx prettier --write "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
